ALPHAPROPERTY MANAGEMENT

APM (Alpha Property Management) – Alphamor’s professional and flexible team also maintain and service properties for South African home owners residing or working in foreign countries.

This service includes the following:

  • Rental collections and tenant management
  • We see to all minor home improvements/ renovations or tenant needs
  • We will maintain/ service your garden, pool, security and alarm system as well as electrical and mechanical (cars) requirements
  • Domestic services are available whereby we will send in a team to spring clean your home to the highest levels of excellence
  • We attend to any municipal or traffic needs (ie: monitor and attend to traffic fines, update vehicle licensing and the service and maintenance of your vehicle)

Contact Us Now

ALPHAMOR SOLUTIONS

Our unique services in property management allows you to live with peace of mind.

The process is as simple as calling our offices on +27 67 027 6023, book an appointment for an onsite assessment after which a formal quotation will follow. Assembled gates and fixed bars will be brought to site on the day of installation. We offer an after sales service to maintaining and servicing all our equipment we install.

Our registered address is:

8 Topsham Road

Ottery East

Cape Town, 7800

Our hours

Monday: 8am - 5pm

Saturday: 9am - 4pm

Sunday : Closed
